first_missing_operator_action.name: Capture Before Evidence
first_missing_operator_action.reason: The fulfillment workbench design defines the action, and proof-run evidence files exist, but there is no integrated operator-facing execution surface that binds the action into the Command Center workflow.

first_missing_lifecycle_transition.reason: Payment-to-fulfillment bridging exists, but the next evidence stage remains a manual proof-run step rather than an integrated lifecycle transition.

first_missing_completion_proof.name: merchant_proof_package_bound_to_active_fulfillment_item
first_missing_completion_proof.reason: A composed proof package can be generated from the proof-run artifacts, but StaffordOS still lacks an integrated completion proof that binds the package back to the active fulfillment item as governed completion evidence.

operator_actions_status.gap: Verified payment truth and bridge exist, but the operator workflow is not yet surfaced as a first-class fulfillment action.

lifecycle_transitions.note: Requires proof-package composition from three evidence artifacts.

completion_proof_missing: A fulfillment-truth-backed completion marker tied to the active merchant proof package

highest_roi_remaining_implementation: Bind the fulfillment workbench panel in /operator/command-center to the proof-run evidence and proof-package writers, then add a governed completion writeback for the active fulfillment item.
